name: Oat Bran Banana Bread 2
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Safflower oil (or any vegetable oil)
2 cups Plus 2 tbsp very warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Get ready for a 3-4 pound loaf. Place yeast in the bottom of the Auto Bakery.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients except liquid into the pan in the order listed.
3. Add 1 cup plus the 2 tbsp of very warm water.
4. Select white bread and press "Start."
5. Leave the lid open. After a minute as the machine mixes the dough, add the remaining very warm water slowly.
6. This recipe is very large and may kick up some flour over the edge or on the glass dome at the beginning. Adding the liquid slowly will help prevent this.
7. The pan will be very full and the bread won't rise much. But, it will be a tall loaf. If your bread rises too much, cut down on the liquid. If it seems too dry, increase the liquid.
8. Note: Try adding 1/2 cup walnuts.
